{{CargoRelic
|name=Garden Aroma
|class_id=20639
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Chan-hee, with her unique craftsmanship, refines the pure essence of nature's flowers. The name evokes visions of a lush garden, where vibrant greenery and scents transport you to a springtime oasis. Each layer of fragrance unfolds gradually, cleansing and uplifting your soul with the sweet aroma.
|fame=14
|art=31
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=16
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail DEF +1<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail DEF +2<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail DEF +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss4=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail DEF +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150
|ss7=Snail ATK +30<br>Per 3 Incense used, Snail DEF +3<br>Incense Used: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
